title: Build connected AI: Orchestrate tools and agents with registries and ADK
summary: Google Cloud presented the Agent Development Kit (ADK) with Agent Registry for building connected AI agents that can access organizational data across SaaS and on-premises systems. The session covers using Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers for tool integration and building custom MCP servers to transform APIs into agent-ready tools.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates the Agent Development Kit (ADK) paired with an Agent Registry for building connected AI agents that reach organizational data across SaaS and on-premises systems. The session centers on the Model Context Protocol (MCP) as the integration layer, covering both the use of existing MCP servers for tool access and the construction of custom MCP servers that turn APIs into agent-ready tools. The takeaway is a workflow for orchestrating tools and agents through registries, with MCP as the mechanism for wiring agents to internal and external data.
